name: ASRock W880M WS Workstation Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x4 - Support DDR5-6400 - 2x M.2 Slots - 1x MCIO (PCIe5.0 x8 or 2 PCIe5.0 x4) - 1x MCIO (2 PCIe4.0 x4) - Dual Gigabit LAN - HDMI - DisplayPort
shortName: ASRock W880M WS Workstation Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Micro-ATX workstation motherboard with LGA 1851 socket and PCIe 5.0 for professional applications.
